description_long: This hammer features a robust, rectangular black head with a solid, block-like appearance, suggesting it is designed for heavy-duty striking tasks. The head is attached to a straight, cylindrical handle that appears to be made of wood, providing a natural grip and shock absorption. The head lacks any visible claws or peens, indicating it is a sledge-type hammer, ideal for demolition or driving stakes. The surface of the head is matte and dark, with no visible markings, logos, or signs of wear. The handle is smooth and untextured, with a natural wood grain visible. The overall design is utilitarian, with no additional attachments or accessories present.
description: A heavy-duty sledge hammer with a rectangular black head and a straight wooden handle, designed for powerful striking tasks. The hammer is simple, robust, and lacks any visible branding or accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full rectangular face of the black hammer head and the straight wooden handle extending downward.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the narrow profile of the hammer head and the cylindrical shape of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the flat back face of the hammer head and the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow side of the head and the handle's profile.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle, cylindrical, smooth, with visible wood grain and no grip enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledge-type head, solid black, with flat striking faces and no claws or peens.
